scenario: Content-search results mixing 2 long-form articles and 1 video post. Articles carry <h3> titles and subtitles; video reuses feed-shared-update-v2 shell.
notes: Exercises the 'post type varies per result' case. Future SEARCH_CONTENT parser should distinguish article vs video by data-urn prefix (urn:li:article vs urn:li:activity) and/or presence of a <h3 class="feed-shared-article__title">.
